item.title: Download Filou NC Gorilla 2026.03.31

With Filou NC Gorilla, you create all your work in one software, from simple and fast 2D design to transfer to CNC machine/control to mill your workpiece. item.title: Download SmartGit 25.1.128
item.description: SmartGit is a cross-platform, graphical Git application designed for professional users to simplify and enhance Git version control workflows. SmartGit supports major Git hosting services like GitHub, Bitbucket, GitLab, and Azure DevOps with built-in features to handle pull requests, comments, and code reviews directly in the app. Why choose SmartGit as your Git Client? One for all. SmartGit helps new Git users as well as helps experienced developers work more efficiently. SmartGit...

item.title: Download FastNeuron BackupChain 4.1.5504
item.description: BackupChain is a powerful, easy-to-use backup software for IT professionals. It is a fully automated and configurable solution that offers file versioning, deduplication, and delta compression. Additionally, BackupChain offers Hyper-V virtual machine backup and database protection, as well as a powerful multi-threading engine for parallel processing. Files, databases and virtual machines can be easily copied to network servers, USB, iSCSI, local drives and FTP. Features of FastNeuron...

item.title: Download Battery Notifier 4.2.1
item.description: Battery Notifier is a free and Open Source application that monitors the status of your battery charge and notifies you when the battery is full or you need to connect a charger. It also acts as a system information tool providing detailed information about the designed capacity and current and remaining battery life. You can turn off full or low battery notification and define battery percentage to notify you in Settings. Other settings include custom sound, dark mode, and window...

item.title: Download Cloudflare WARP 2026.3.846.0
item.description: Cloudflare WARP is a free application developed by Cloudflare that provides a secure and private connection to the internet. The app acts as a Virtual Private Network (VPN) service, encrypting users' internet traffic and routing it through Flare's global network. Cloudflare Zero Trust replaces legacy security perimeters with Cloudflare's global network, making the Internet faster and more secure for teams around the world. Consult our reference architecture to learn how to evolve your...

item.title: Download Prey Basic 1.13.29
item.description: Prey is free software that allows you to track and find your laptop, phone and tablet whenever stolen or missing - easily and all in one place. It's open source, lightweight, offering you full remote control, 24/7. You can quickly find out what the thief looks, what he is doing on your device and where he is actually hiding using GPS or WiFi geolocation. It's payback time. Basically, you install a small agent in your PC or phone that will silently wait for the remote signal to wake up and...
